districts.name: Dojo Gate
districts.subtitle: Where discipline becomes mastery.
districts.description: Dojo Gate represents the practice of learning itself — the discipline of returning to fundamentals, the patience of repetition, and the mastery that comes only from deliberate practice sustained over time.

districts.name: Floating Citadel
districts.subtitle: A stronghold built from proven accomplishment.
districts.description: The Floating Citadel represents professional achievement — the credentials, recognitions, and proven expertise that stand as evidence of mastery earned rather than claimed.

districts.name: Git Forest
districts.subtitle: Where every repository becomes a living tree.
districts.description: The Git Forest is a living archive of every project. Trees grow from repositories. Their rings record commits. Lanterns celebrate releases. Fireflies gather around active development.

districts.name: Hall of Knowledge
districts.subtitle: Where understanding is gathered and kept.
districts.description: The Hall of Knowledge represents accumulated knowledge — research, reflection, and documentation gathered and organized so that understanding, once earned, is never lost.

guardians.name: The Archivist
guardians.title: Keeper of Every Commit
guardians.quote: Nothing is ever truly lost. Every commit leaves a ring within the forest.

guardians.name: The Custodian
guardians.title: Keeper of Verified Mastery
guardians.quote: The citadel does not open for claims. It opens for proof.

guardians.name: The Scribe
guardians.title: Keeper of Written Knowledge
guardians.quote: A thought unwritten is a thought that will be walked past twice.

guardians.name: The Warden
guardians.title: Keeper of the Threshold
guardians.quote: Every path through this world begins with a single, deliberate step through the gate.

repositories.story: Personal C++ learning repository focused on computer science fundamentals, algorithms, systems programming, and performance optimization.
DevPod dotfiles for reproducible DevOps environments (nvim, tmux, pnpm, fd, ripgrep, lazygit)
Learning Go through exercises, projects, DevOps automation, and coding challenges.
Personal JavaScript learning repository focused on full-stack development, web automation, internal tools, and DevOps dashboards.
The Ancient Oak represents the evolution of my Kubernetes GitOps homelab.
Rust-powered uptime and infrastructure monitoring platform for websites, APIs, SSL certificates, and WordPress integration.

profiles.name: Gerso Robayo-Guillen
profiles.title: Senior Systems Administrator
profiles.tagline: Building secure infrastructure, automation, and cloud-native systems that scale.
